message:
fix(safety): overflow guards, error propagation, hash coverage, and JWT identity

- s3_fifo_cache_gate: replace += with saturating_add(1) for sequence
  and operation counters to prevent integer overflow panics
- persistent_cache_contract: replace .expect() with .map_err() for
  JSON serialization failures, propagating io::Error instead of panicking
- adversarial_workload_synthesis: include infra_failure_detail in hash
  and add full_content_hash() method with domain coverage tracking
- capability_token: add jti (JWT ID) field to signing preimage in
  build_unsigned_view() for token uniqueness guarantees

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
